title: prestonia acrensis
intro: Prestonia acrensis, also known as "Yellow Bitter Cured" or "Yellow Prestonia", is a plant species native to the tropical forests of South America, particularly in the Amazon region. It is a climber with yellow flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Prestonia acrensis include its ability to treat fever, malaria, and other infectious diseases, as well as its use as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Prestonia acrensis are typically made from the plant's roots and leaves, which can be consumed as a tea, tincture, or infused in oil for topical use.
